nodes.label: NEXUS Self-Evolving Skill Lifecycle — 5-stage skill creation and management.
Categories for organizing skills by domain.
Manages the complete lifecycle of self-evolving skills.      Skills go through
Stage 1 - DISCOVERY: Identify a new skill from task patterns.          Args:
Stage 2 - DESIGN: Define the skill's interface and behavior.          Uses LLM
Stage 3 - IMPLEMENT: Generate the skill's code.          Uses LLM to generate
Stage 4 - VALIDATE: Test the skill implementation.          Runs test cases ag
Stage 5 - DEPLOY: Register the skill as an MCP tool.          Makes the skill
Advance a skill to the next stage in the lifecycle.
Evolve an existing skill based on usage feedback.          Takes a skill back
List all skills, optionally filtered by status.
Use LLM to design skill parameters.
Use LLM to generate skill implementation.
Use LLM to generate test cases.
Run a single test case against the skill implementation.
Automatically improve skills based on usage patterns and benchmark scores.
Record a skill usage event for tracking.          Triggers improvement check w
Check a skill's performance and trigger evolution if needed.
Build targeted improvement feedback from skill metrics.
Run a complete improvement cycle across all skills.          Returns:
Build feedback from skill dict (when skill object not available).
